definition:
1. to put the feet in bonds, to fetter , (Herdotus Historicus): —;Pass., ἐμπεποδισμένος τοὺς πόδας (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. generally, to hinder, thwart, impede , Lat. impedire, τινά (Aristophanes Comicus); πρός τι in  a thing, (Isocrates Orator):—;Pass., (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. ὥσπερ ἐμποδίζων ἰσχάδας like one stringing  figs or treading  figs flat  for packing, (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
